title: Epsom Cold Snap
lead: A severe cold snap is affecting Epsom, with a Z-Score of -3.00. This event has a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current weather conditions in Epsom are characterized by a high level of humidity, with an Umidita of 75% and a moderate wind speed of 9.4 km/h. 
 The Heating Degree Days (HDD) is 11.5 GG, indicating a significant need for heating. 
 The lack of Cooling Degree Days (CDD) with 0.0 GG, confirms the cold nature of this snap.
conclusion: Implement emergency protocols to mitigate the effects of the cold snap in Epsom.
